meaning: adj.不爱讲话的,阴沉的,顽强的,严厉的
examples: The city, drab and dour by day, is transformed at night.
The game proved to be a dour struggle, with both men determined to win.
Dar Dour (The Iraqi TV show spoof).
Lines of dour-faced apothecaries presided over little sacks of mysterious powders and twisted roots.
The second half was largely a dour affair and it quickly evolved into a midfield scrap.
